---
title: |
  Machine Learning for Characterization and Processing<br>Unit 8: Surrogate Models for Process Optimization
bibliography: ref.bib
author:
  - name: Prof. Dr. Philipp Pelz
    affiliation:
      - FAU Erlangen-Nürnberg
execute:
  eval: false
format:
  revealjs:
    width: 1920
    height: 1080
    template-partials:
      - title-slide.html
    css: custom.css
    theme: custom.scss
    slide-number: c/t
    logo: "eclipse_logo_small.png"
    footer: "© Philipp Pelz - ML for Characterization and Processing"
---

## 01. Title: Surrogate Models for Process Optimization
- Unit role and scope.

## 02. Learning outcomes
- Build surrogates and optimize process parameters.

## 03. Recap from Unit 7
- PSP modeling as surrogate backbone.

## 04. Why surrogates in process control
- Expensive experiments/simulations.

## 05. Problem formulation
- Inputs, outputs, constraints.

## 06. Surrogate model families
- GP, trees, neural surrogates.

## 07. Fidelity considerations
- Low vs high fidelity signals.

## 08. Data efficiency strategies
- Sample-limited settings.

## 09. Uncertainty-aware surrogates
- Predictive mean + variance.

## 10. Validation of surrogates
- Error + calibration checks.

## 11. Trust regions
- Safe optimization domains.

## 12. Objective definition
- Yield/quality/time tradeoffs.

## 13. Constraint modeling
- Hard and soft limits.

## 14. Optimization methods overview
- Gradient, evolutionary, BO.

## 15. Bayesian optimization loop
- Acquisition-guided sampling.

## 16. Acquisition choices
- EI, UCB, PI intuition.

## 17. Batch optimization
- Parallel experiment planning.

## 18. Multi-objective optimization
- Pareto fronts in process settings.

## 19. Robust optimization
- Sensitivity to process noise.

## 20. Online update loop
- Refit after each experiment batch.

## 21. Drift and nonstationarity
- Time-varying process behavior.

## 22. Transfer across machines
- Domain adaptation concerns.

## 23. Human-in-the-loop safeguards
- Expert veto and sanity checks.

## 24. Safety constraints
- Operational risk boundaries.

## 25. Candidate ranking strategies
- Utility + uncertainty balance.

## 26. Stopping criteria
- Diminishing returns decisions.

## 27. Reproducibility standards
- Logs, seeds, experiment IDs.

## 28. Visualization patterns
- Response surfaces and acquisition maps.

## 29. Case sketch: heat treatment tuning
- End-to-end scaffold.

## 30. Case sketch: additive process window
- End-to-end scaffold.

## 31. Case sketch: spectroscopy-guided control
- End-to-end scaffold.

## 32. Failure mode #1
- Surrogate extrapolation error.

## 33. Failure mode #2
- Ignoring uncertainty in decisions.

## 34. Failure mode #3
- Optimizer exploiting artifacts.

## 35. Mitigation checklist
- Practical guardrails.

## 36. Deployment pathway
- Offline to online transition.

## 37. Monitoring in production
- Trigger retraining conditions.

## 38. Bridge to Unit 9
- Physics-informed optimization link.

## 39. Exercise scaffold: build surrogate
- Baseline model + uncertainty.

## 40. Exercise scaffold: optimize objective
- Generate candidate settings.

## 41. Exercise scaffold: compare strategies
- BO vs random/grid baseline.

## 42. Exercise scaffold: robust analysis
- Sensitivity and safety check.

## 43. Exercise scaffold: reporting
- Document protocol and caveats.

## 44. Exam-oriented key statements
- High-yield concepts.

## 45. Summary table
- Models, optimizers, tradeoffs.

## 46. Unit summary
- Core takeaways.

## 47. Reading assignment
- Prepare physics-informed unit.

## 48. Transition preview
- Unit 9 roadmap.

## 49. References
- Source list.

## 50. Q&A buffer slide
- Discussion and synthesis.

::: {#refs}
:::
